raw:
{
  "personas": [
    {
      "name": "Sarah, The Project Manager",
      "demographics": "38 years old, experienced professional, manages a team of 5-10 people, comfortable with technology.",
      "goals": [
        "Ensure projects are delivered on time and within scope.",
        "Track team progress and individual task contributions.",
        "Facilitate clear communication and collaboration within the team.",
        "Identify and address bottlenecks proactively."
      ],
      "pain_points": [
        "Lack of a clear, consolidated overview of team workload and project status.",
        "Difficulty tracking individual task progress without constant follow-ups.",
        "Scattered communication across multiple platforms (email, chat, old tools).",
        "Late or missed notifications about critical task changes or overdue items."
      ],
      "scenarios": [
        "Setting up a new project workspace and inviting team members.",
        "Assigning a series of tasks to different team members with specific due dates.",
        "Reviewing the overall progress of a project and identifying overdue tasks.",
        "Receiving an alert when a critical task is marked complete or blocked."
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "David, The Individual Contributor",
      "demographics": "29 years old, software developer/marketing specialist, part of a larger team, tech-savvy.",
      "goals": [
        "Efficiently manage personal tasks and prioritize workload.",
        "Clearly understand task requirements and deadlines.",
        "Easily update task status and provide progress reports.",
        "Collaborate seamlessly with team members on shared tasks.",
        "Avoid missing deadlines and stay informed about relevant updates."
      ],
      "pain_points": [
        "Feeling overwhelmed by too many notifications or irrelevant updates.",
        "Unclear or incomplete task descriptions leading to rework.",
        "Difficulty finding specific tasks or understanding their context within a project.",
        "Switching between too many tools to manage tasks and communicate."
      ],
      "scenarios": [
        "Receiving a new task assignment and understanding its priority.",
        "Updating the status of a task to 'In Progress' and adding a comment.",
        "Asking a question about a task directly within the app and getting a quick response.",
        "Viewing all tasks assigned to him across different projects/workspaces."
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "Emily, The Freelancer/Consultant",
      "demographics": "34 years old, self-employed, works with multiple clients simultaneously, values efficiency.",
      "goals": [
        "Keep track of tasks and deadlines for various client projects.",
        "Provide clear and transparent updates to clients on project progress.",
        "Manage time effectively across different engagements.",
        "Centralize client communication related to tasks.",
        "Maintain a professional and organized image."
      ],
      "pain_points": [
        "Juggling tasks across multiple client-specific platforms or spreadsheets.",
        "Difficulty separating tasks and notifications for different clients.",
        "Lack of a unified view of all ongoing work.",
        "Needing to invite clients to yet another new system, which can be a barrier to adoption."
      ],
      "scenarios": [
        "Creating a new workspace for a new client project.",
        "Inviting a client to view the progress of their specific tasks.",
        "Marking a task as complete and automatically notifying the client.",
        "Filtering tasks to see only those related to a specific client."
      ]
    }
  ],
  "user_journeys": [
    {
      "persona": "Sarah, The Project Manager",
      "steps": [
        {
          "action": "Receives a new project brief and realizes the need to set up a new project in the task
